task: Go to the URL and complete the animated form by filling in all required fields and submitting. If needed, create a file. Validate that the form was filled and submitted successfully. https://browser-use.github.io/stress-tests/challenges/animated-form.html
graderReasoning: The agent successfully completed the task by navigating to the specified URL, identifying all required fields in the animated form, and filling them out. It correctly handled the file upload requirement by creating a minimal PDF file using the `bash` tool after an initial attempt with `repl` failed due to module limitations. The agent then uploaded this file and submitted the form. Finally, it validated the successful submission by extracting the success message from the page content. The agent demonstrated good problem-solving by recovering from a disposed page error and adapting its file creation method.
